text: Which of the following describes the difference between a Snowflake 'Direct Share' and the 'Snowflake Marketplace'?

options.a: Direct Shares can only be used between accounts in the same organization.
options.b: The Marketplace allows for one-to-many sharing and discovery of third-party datasets.
options.c: Direct Shares require data movement, while the Marketplace does not.
options.d: The Marketplace is only for semi-structured data.

text: True or False: Snowflake allows you to share data with a consumer in a different cloud provider (e.g., AWS to GCP) using a standard Direct Share.
What is the primary function of the 'Cloud Services' layer in Snowflake's architecture?

options.b: Executing the heavy compute of analytical queries.
options.c: Managing metadata, security, query optimization, and infrastructure.
options.d: Providing the network backbone between regions.

text: Which role is recommended for daily administrative tasks like managing schemas and loading data to avoid using the ACCOUNTADMIN role?
What is the default 'Time Travel' retention period for a new table in the Standard edition?
True or False: Multi-cluster warehouses can be configured to start and stop automatically based on demand.
Which Snowflake component handles the coordination of concurrent queries on a single warehouse?
What does the 'ON_ERROR = ABORT_STATEMENT' option do when using the COPY command?

options.a: It skips the file with errors and continues.
options.b: It stops the entire load and rolls back the transaction if a single error is found.
options.c: It retries the error file three times.

text: True or False: Snowflake allows the creation of 'Managed Access Schemas' to centralize privilege management.
Which command is used to view the list of files in a specific stage?
What is the primary benefit of 'Micro-partitions'?

options.a: They allow for user-defined partitioning logic.
options.b: They enable granular pruning, allowing Snowflake to skip reading irrelevant data.
options.c: They store data in row-format for faster inserts.
options.d: They provide 90 days of fail-safe automatically.

text: Which view is used to monitor the credit consumption of 'Materialized View' maintenance?
True or False: Snowflake 'Shares' can contain objects from multiple different databases in the same account.
What is 'Snowpark'?

options.a: A specialized cloud region for Snowflake training.
options.b: A developer framework that allows building data applications using Python, Java, or Scala.
options.c: The internal storage engine of Snowflake.
options.d: A data migration tool for moving from on-prem to cloud.

text: Which command is used to delete all data from a table while keeping the table structure intact?
True or False: All virtual warehouses in a Snowflake account share the same 'Metadata Cache'.
What is the primary purpose of 'Single Sign-On' (SSO) in Snowflake?

options.a: To allow users to log in with credentials managed by an external Identity Provider.
options.b: To limit a user to one concurrent session.
options.c: To encrypt passwords at the user level.
options.d: To bypass the need for a warehouse.

text: Which command is used to upload a local file to a Snowflake internal stage using SnowSQL?
What happens to 'Time Travel' data when a Permanent table is dropped?

options.b: It is preserved, and the table can be recovered within the retention period using UNDROP.
options.d: It is moved to an external stage backup.

text: Which role is required to manage 'Organizational' tasks like creating new Snowflake accounts?
True or False: Snowflake 'External Functions' can call a web service hosted on AWS Lambda or Azure Functions.
What is the default file format for unloading data if not specified in the command?
Which of the following is true regarding 'Zero-copy cloning'?

options.a: It creates a physical copy of all underlying data files.
options.b: It creates new metadata pointing to the same data files as the source.
options.c: It is only available for database objects, not tables.
options.d: It requires the warehouse to be at least size 'Large'.

text: What is the primary function of 'Row Access Policies'?

options.a: To limit the speed of data ingestion.
options.b: To filter query results based on user roles and defined security criteria.
options.d: To manage the storage of individual rows.

text: Which Snowflake UI component provides a graphical view of a query's execution and performance bottlenecks?
Which describes the 'Search Optimization Service'?

options.a: It optimizes the search bar in the Snowsight UI.
options.b: It builds a persistent data structure to speed up specific point lookup queries.
options.c: It is a free feature in all Snowflake editions.
options.d: It requires manual re-indexing by the end-user.

text: True or False: Data in 'Fail-safe' can be queried by a user with the ACCOUNTADMIN role.
Which of the following objects can have 'Object Tags' applied for governance? (Choose three.)
What is the function of the 'Object Tagging' feature?

options.a: To provide a way to group and track objects for sensitive data and cost management.
options.d: To share data with external partners.

text: Which command is used to see the metadata for all columns in a table?
True or False: Snowflake automatically manages 'scaling up' (T-shirt size) based on query complexity.
Which component of the architecture handles query coordination on a warehouse?
What happens to credit consumption when a warehouse is 'Suspended'?

options.c: It stops after the 60-second minimum is met.
options.d: It stops only at the top of the hour.

text: Which role is the most privileged in the Snowflake RBAC hierarchy?
True or False: Snowflake allows 'External Tables' to query data in Azure Blob storage.
What is the purpose of 'Time Travel'?

options.b: Accessing and restoring data changed or deleted over a specified period.

text: Which command is used to see the list of 'Resource Monitors'?
True or False: Snowflake charges a premium for storing data in its optimized columnar format.
Which function converts a JSON string into a VARIANT type?
What is the result of 'Scaling Out' a warehouse?

options.b: Adding clusters to a multi-cluster warehouse to handle concurrency.
options.c: Moving data to a new region.

text: Which role is primarily responsible for managing Users and Roles?
True or False: Snowflake supports 'Multi-factor Authentication' for all users.
Which command clones a database?
What is the default character for field delimiting in the COPY command?
True or False: A warehouse consumes credits while in 'Starting' state.
Which of the following describes 'Search Optimization Service'?

options.b: Background service improving point lookup performance on large tables.

text: What is the benefit of the 'Snowflake Data Marketplace'?

options.b: Discovery and querying of third-party data without ETL or movement.

text: Which role manages 'Organizational' tasks like creating new accounts?
True or False: Data shared via a 'Share' object is read-only for the consumer.
What is 'Pruning' in Snowflake?

options.b: Skipping micro-partitions that don't contain relevant data for a query based on metadata.

text: Which edition is the first to include 'Time Travel' up to 90 days?
True or False: A 'Transient' table survives a session disconnect.
Which Snowflake component handles 'Transaction Management'?
What does 'ON_ERROR = ABORT_STATEMENT' do in COPY INTO?

options.b: Stops load and rolls back if any error is encountered.

text: Which command downloads a file from a stage using SnowSQL?
True or False: Zero-copy cloning can be done on a Table but not a Schema.
Which role is primarily responsible for 'Security' and 'Access Control'?
What is the purpose of 'Dynamic Data Masking'?

options.b: Obscuring sensitive data in query results based on role.

text: Which view monitors credit consumption of the entire account?
True or False: Snowflake allows using 'External Functions' to call an external API.
What is the default T-shirt size for a Warehouse?
Which role is the only one that can see 'Billing' in the UI?
True or False: Snowflake 'Snowpipe' uses a virtual warehouse.
Which command sees the list of 'Pipes'?
What is 'Fail-safe'?

options.b: 7-day period after Time Travel where Snowflake support can recover data from failure.

text: Which view sees all 'Tasks' in an account?
True or False: Snowflake handles encryption in transit automatically.
Primary function of a 'Task'?

options.b: Executing a SQL statement or stored procedure on a schedule.

text: Which layer handles 'Access Control'?
True or False: Transient tables survive crashes.
Command to see users?
Result of 'Scaling Up'?
Which edition for 'Business Critical' PrivateLink?
True or False: Can apply Masking Policy to a View.
Snowflake component for 'Query Parsing'?
True or False: Snowflake allows sharing with other accounts in the same region without a 'Data Exchange'.
Primary function of 'Resource Monitors'?

options.b: Limiting/monitoring credit consumption and suspending warehouses.

text: True or False: Snowflake supports 'External Functions' calling APIs.
Command to see stages?
Recommended file size for data loading?
True or False: Row Access Policies filter rows by user role.
View for history of all 'Task' executions?
Default T-shirt size if not specified?
True or False: Secure Views protect underlying SQL query.
Command to see 'Clustering Depth'?
Purpose of 'Dynamic Data Masking'?

options.b: Obscuring sensitive results based on role.

text: True or False: Resource Monitors can be set at individual Warehouse level.
Snowflake CLI tool?
DML stands for?
True or False: Tri-Secret Secure is for customer-managed keys.
Command to see 'DDL' of a table?
Diff between Permanent and Transient? (Choose two.)

options.c: Perm supports 90 day Time Travel; Trans 1 day.

text: True or False: Can share across regions using 'Private Link'.
Function of Information Schema?
Role for schema management and ownership?
Default Time Travel for new table?
True or False: Multi-cluster clusters add/remove one at a time.
Component for Query Optimization?
What does STRIP_OUTER_ARRAY do?

options.b: Removes square brackets and loads each element as row.

text: True or False: Can override Account Network Policy at User level.
